title: Nursery Rhyme. LX. Tales.
content:
Tom, Tom, the piper's son,
        Stole a pig, and away he run!
        The pig was eat, and Tom was beat,
        And Tom went roaring down the street.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. LX. Tales."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
